hooks.command: { git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; AHEAD=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ "${AHEAD:-0}" -gt 0 ] || exit 0; printf '[%s] auto-push %s commit(s)\n' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S')" "$AHEAD" >> /tmp/peer-autopush.log; git push >> /tmp/peer-autopush.log 2>&1; } || true
